CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2005 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2005 Continued To Dec-23-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-01-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Trinity Capital Corporation.
Order waiving live witness in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Jackie K. Park Inc. dba White Total Cleaners and Jae Kwan Park as follows:
Principal $95,702.53
Prejudgment Interest $4,870.95
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $401.80, for a total of $103,475.28
Plaintiff is entitled to the leased equipment listed in the Judgment, see scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession & Hearing (Defendant Parks Personal Property)

APPEARANCES:
